title: PET PALS - 211info
text: COUNCIL ON AGING OF CENTRAL OREGON PET PALS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pet food, pet supplies, and limited basic veterinary care assistance. 1036 NE 5th Street Bend, OR 97701 Eligibility: Meals on Wheels participants Hours: Pet food deliveries: Varies Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 678-9770 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 678-9770 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties and City of Gilchrist, and unincorporated area of Crescent (Klamath County only SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Services: Pet Care Supplies * Older Adults Pet Food * Older Adults Veterinary Care Expense Assistance * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - MEALS ON WHEELS HOME-DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CARING CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
